name: porch-potty-marketing
description: Marketing workflows for Porch Potty, a dog-potty e-commerce brand under BlueKube. Produces recommend-only reports and audits from uploaded exports, pasted data, and connected read-only sources.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend-only Porch Potty marketing audits and reports.
interface.longDescription: Marketing workflows for Porch Potty. Run cited weekly audits, standard reports, paid media audits, ecommerce KPI reads, and readiness checks from uploaded exports, pasted data, and connected read-only sources. Missing sources are marked missing or degraded rather than invented.
interface.defaultPrompt: Check what Porch Potty marketing reports can run from the current files and connected read-only sources.
